news.title: US Startup Plans Data Centres’ Space Odyssey
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] It sounds like science fiction, but US-based satellite startup Orbital is looking to set up data centres in space that may power responses given by chatbots as artificial intelligence (AI) drives an unprecedented demand for computing power.
